pathTokens.description: Fixed install-layout hints for brace tokens {skillsRoot} / {sharedDir}. Not relocatable; defaults match the installer. Agents expand before tool calls. See tools.md § Path tokens.

skillsRoot.description: Expand {skillsRoot}. Install contract; do not relocate.

workingBranch.description: Active delivery branch used by ship-pr / Step 8–9

providers.description: Work-item/spec source and SCM host. Optional: when omitted, infer active from issueTrackers.*.enabled (GitHub if enabled, else Azure DevOps, else local); scm defaults to active when active is github|azure-devops, or from project.repoUrl host when active is local.

active.description: Provider skill for fetch-to-spec / entry registration. When set, overrides bare-number tracker preference from issueTrackers.*.enabled.

scm.description: Provider skill for create-pr, list-threads, resolve-thread, merge-pr, and remote validate-auth. Never local. Hybrid allowed: active=local with scm=github|azure-devops.

specsDir.description: Repo-relative directory for human-facing local specs (default: .agents/specs). Prefer existing repo-root specs/ when already present. Used by local-spec-provider detect/configure and optional mirrors; canonical workflow copy remains {us-dir}/step-00-{slug}.spec.md

worktreesDir.description: Worktree root template; {slug} substituted at runtime. Prefer nesting under plans.dir (e.g. .agents/plans/{slug}/worktrees).

useWorktrees.description: When true, prefer git worktree isolation for Step 4 implement (non-win32, path length ≤180, git worktree add succeeds).

dir.description: Root for local PR review round reports (fix-pr / goal-fix-pr)
